# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: https://www.googleapis.com/clouddeploymentmanager/v2/projects/cloud-foundation-cicd/global/terraform-module/vm.jinja
- path: https://www.googleapis.com/clouddeploymentmanager/v2/projects/cloud-foundation-cicd/global/terraform-module/sql.jinja

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: ${properties["region"]}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: ${properties["subnet_cidr"]}

- name: app-firewall-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - ${properties["ssh_source_range"]}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    targetTags:
    - app-vm

- name: app-firewall-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
    targetTags:
    - app-vm

- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: ${properties["service_account_id"]}
    displayName: App VM Service Account

- name: app-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: ${properties["zone"]}
    machineType: zones/${properties["zone"]}/machineTypes/${properties["machine_type"]}
    tags:
      items:
      - app-vm
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    disks:
    - boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: ${properties["boot_image"]}
        diskSizeGb: ${properties["boot_disk_size_gb"]}
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          systemctl enable nginx
          systemctl start nginx

- name: app-sql-ip-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    name: ${properties["sql_private_ip_name"]}
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: ${properties["sql_private_ip_prefix_length"]}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

- name: app-sql-peer
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    service: servicenetworking.googleapis.com
    reservedPeeringRanges:
    - $(ref.app-sql-ip-range.name)

- name: app-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: ${properties["region"]}
    databaseVersion: ${properties["sql_database_version"]}
    settings:
      tier: ${properties["sql_tier"]}
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      dataDiskSizeGb: ${properties["sql_disk_size_gb"]}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    rootPassword: ${properties["sql_root_password"]}

- name: app-sql-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    name: ${properties["sql_database_name"]}
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)

- name: app-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${properties["bucket_name"]}
    location: ${properties["region"]}
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: ${properties["bucket_lifecycle_age_days"]}

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: ${properties["instance_group_self_link"]}
    enableCDN: false
    timeoutSec: 30

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: "80"

outputs:
- name: instance_name
  value: $(ref.app-instance.name)
- name: instance_external_ip
  value: $(ref.app-instance.networkInterfaces[0].accessConfigs[0].natIP)
- name: sql_instance_connection_name
  value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.connectionName)
- name: bucket_name
  value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.name)
- name: load_balancer_ip
  value: $(ref.app-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
